title: write_xaiger2: out of range exception
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.53+70 (git sha1 e046e3cdb, g++ 15.1.1 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

```
read_rtlil <<EOF

# Generated by Yosys 0.53+98 (git sha1 780b12271, g++ 15.1.1 -fPIC -O3)
autoidx 30
attribute \top 1
attribute \src "top.v:1.1-21.10"
module \top
  attribute \src "top.v:7.15-7.18"
  wire output 1 \led
  attribute \src "top.v:9.8-9.9"
  wire \w
  attribute \src "top.v:20.16-20.18"
  cell $not $not$top.v:20$1
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    parameter \A_WIDTH 1
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
    connect \A \w
    connect \Y \led
  end
  attribute \module_not_derived 1
  attribute \src "top.v:10.10-18.4"
  cell \CC_MX4 \mux
    connect \D0 1'x
    connect \D1 1'x
    connect \D2 1'x
    connect \D3 { }
    connect \S0 1'x
    connect \S1 1'x
    connect \Y \w
  end
end

EOF

read_verilog -lib -specify <<EOF

(* abc9_box, lib_whitebox *)
module CC_MX4 (
        input  D0, D1, D2, D3,
        input  S0, S1,
        output Y
);
        specify
                (D0 => Y) = 453;
                (D1 => Y) = 449;
                (D2 => Y) = 488;
                (D3 => Y) = 484;
                (S0 => Y) = 422;
                (S1 => Y) = 385;
        endspecify

        assign Y = S1 ? (S0 ? D3 : D2) :
                        (S0 ? D1 : D0);

endmodule

EOF

abc_new
```

### Expected Behavior

It doesn't crash.

### Actual Behavior

```
3.4.2. Executing XAIGER2 backend.
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::out_of_range'
  what():  vector::_M_range_check: __n (which is 0) >= this->size() (which is 0)
Aborted (core dumped)
```
code_blocks:
read_rtlil <<EOF

autoidx 30

    parameter \A_WIDTH 1

    connect \A \w
    connect \Y \led
  end
  attribute \module_not_derived 1
  attribute \src "top.v:10.10-18.4"
  cell \CC_MX4 \mux
    connect \D0 1'x
    connect \D1 1'x
    connect \D2 1'x
    connect \D3 { }
    connect \S0 1'x
    connect \S1 1'x

end

EOF

read_verilog -lib -specify <<EOF

module CC_MX4 (
        input  D0, D1, D2, D3,
        input  S0, S1,

        specify
                (D0 => Y) = 453;

                (S0 => Y) = 422;
                (S1 => Y) = 385;
        endspecify

        assign Y = S1 ? (S0 ? D3 : D2) :
                        (S0 ? D1 : D0);

endmodule

EOF

abc_new

3.4.2. Executing XAIGER2 backend.
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::out_of_range'
  what():  vector::_M_range_check: __n (which is 0) >= this->size() (which is 0)
Aborted (core dumped)
